steps.title: Identify the conclusion's key pattern
steps.content: The researchers concluded that in only one country are there more insect species than fungus species—meaning the other two must have more fungi than insects.

steps.title: Match the table data to the pattern
steps.content: Choice C directly shows Bulgaria as the only country with more insects (16) than fungi (14), while Great Britain and Belgium both have more fungi than insects—exactly the pattern the researchers' conclusion describes. The other choices either misstate Bulgaria's numbers or cite data without establishing this comparative pattern. That matches choice C — C is correct.
